items.title: [正面] Beautiful animation, well fleshed out characters,...
items.summary:
Beautiful animation, well fleshed out characters, and wonderful gameplay. The card game is stimulating and rewarding. 
Best of all, Morimens is VERY F2P friendly and allows you many chances to earn characters and other rewards.
items.review:
Beautiful animation, well fleshed out characters, and wonderful gameplay. The card game is stimulating and rewarding. 
Best of all, Morimens is VERY F2P friendly and allows you many chances to earn characters and other rewards.

items.title: [正面] Im not usually into these types of games, but I re...
items.summary: Im not usually into these types of games, but I really enjoy this one. Great imagery, good gameplay, and great character designs. Every time I play, I get more and more into it.
